About.title: About Us
About.description: We are a leading AC services company in the Eastern Province of Saudi Arabia. With over a decade of experience, we pride ourselves on providing reliable and efficient cooling solutions to our customers.

repair.heroSubtitle: We restore your AC to its original power and efficiency with a real warranty on all repairs.
repair.overviewText: AC maintenance is a pressing necessity in our hot climate. Our specialized team performs an accurate diagnosis of all faults (loud noise, water leakage, weak cooling) and repairs them immediately at your site.
repair.feature1Desc: We reach you within two hours of requesting the service anywhere in Dammam.
repair.feature2Desc: We give you the final cost before starting any repair work.
repair.feature3Desc: We use the latest tools and equipment to ensure a long-lasting repair.
repair.faq1Q: How long does it take to repair the AC?
repair.faq1A: Repairs are usually completed within 60-90 minutes for common faults.
repair.faq2Q: Do you offer a warranty on spare parts?
repair.faq2A: Yes, all original spare parts come with a certified agent warranty in addition to our installation warranty.
repair.faq3Q: Do you repair all AC brands?
repair.faq3A: Yes, we serve all major brands like Samsung, LG, Carrier, Gree, and Midea.
repair.faq4A: The inspection cost is 49 SAR, and it is deducted from the total bill if the repair is done.

installation.heroSubtitle: We guarantee correct installation that prolongs your AC's life and saves electricity.
installation.overviewText: Incorrect installation is the main cause of 80% of future AC problems. We follow the strictest safety and quality standards to ensure optimal performance from day one.
installation.benefit1: Determining the optimal location for units
installation.feature1Desc: We stick to scheduled appointments to ensure no time is wasted.
installation.feature2Desc: Our team is trained to install all systems (Split, Central, Floor Standing).
installation.feature3Desc: We make sure to leave the place as clean as it was after finishing the work.
installation.faq1Q: Does the installation include copper extension?
installation.faq1A: Yes, we offer options including original American Mueller copper extension as needed.
installation.faq2A: Yes, we dismantle, move, and install used ACs with a warranty on installation quality.
installation.faq3Q: How long does it take to install a split AC?
installation.faq3A: A typical installation takes about two to three hours.
installation.faq4A: Certainly, we have special prices for installing ACs for projects and entire buildings.

cleaning.heroSubtitle: Pure air and stronger cooling with deep cleaning service using high-pressure pumps.
cleaning.overviewTitle: Why Should You Clean Your AC Now?
cleaning.overviewText: Accumulated dust and dirt reduce cooling efficiency, increase the electricity bill, and spread allergies. Our service restores your AC's shine and efficiency.
cleaning.feature1Desc: We use special washing bags to protect walls and furniture from water.
cleaning.feature2Desc: We accurately wash indoor and outdoor units and pipes.
cleaning.feature3Desc: We use safe cleaning materials that eliminate bacteria and fungi.
cleaning.faq1Q: How often should the AC be cleaned?
cleaning.faq1A: We recommend deep cleaning once every 6 months in the Eastern Province climate.
cleaning.faq2A: Absolutely, cleaning removes barriers from cooling coils, increasing cold air flow.
cleaning.faq3A: Yes, washing outdoor units is essential to improve AC compressor efficiency.
cleaning.faq4A: Yes, we use specialized pressure pumps that remove deep dirt without damaging the aluminum fins.

gasRecharge.heroTitle: Freon Recharge & Leak Detection in Dammam
gasRecharge.heroSubtitle: We use the best types of original Freon gas to ensure lasting icy cooling.
gasRecharge.overviewTitle: When Does Your AC Need Gas Recharge?
gasRecharge.overviewText: Gas shortage means weak cooling and high energy consumption. We don't just recharge gas; we inspect the cooling system to ensure there are no leaks.
gasRecharge.benefit1: Use of original R410a and R22 Freon gas
gasRecharge.feature1Desc: We use electronic devices to detect the finest gas leak locations.
gasRecharge.feature2Desc: We completely stay away from imitation gases that harm the AC compressor.
gasRecharge.feature3Desc: We recharge gas with the exact weight recommended by the factory.
gasRecharge.faq1A: The AC is a closed system, and gas shortage always means there is a leak that must be repaired.
gasRecharge.faq2Q: What is the difference between Freon types?
gasRecharge.faq2A: We use R410a for modern ACs and R22 for older models according to AC specifications.
gasRecharge.faq3A: Yes, the inspection and recharge process is fully completed at the customer's site.
gasRecharge.faq4Q: Is the smell of Freon dangerous?
gasRecharge.faq4A: Freon is generally a non-toxic gas, but its leak reduces efficiency and needs immediate treatment.

emergency.heroSubtitle: No need to wait in the heat; our technicians are ready to serve you at any time.
emergency.overviewTitle: We Are With You in the Hardest Moments
emergency.overviewText: AC failure in the middle of the night or on public holidays is no longer a problem. Our emergency service covers Dammam and Khobar around the clock.
emergency.benefit3: Immediate repair on the first visit
emergency.benefit4: Full coverage of the Eastern Province
emergency.feature1Desc: We work on Fridays and public holidays without stopping.
emergency.feature2Desc: Our technicians' distribution allows us to reach you in record time.
emergency.feature3Desc: We have the necessary spare parts for immediate repair in most cases.
emergency.faq1A: We maintain competitive prices even in emergency times with small nominal service fees outside official times.
emergency.faq2Q: How long does it take for a technician to arrive in an emergency?
emergency.faq2A: We strive to arrive within 30 to 60 minutes in cases of extreme emergency.
emergency.faq3Q: Is the service available in Khobar?
emergency.faq3A: Yes, our emergency service fully covers Dammam, Khobar, and Dhahran.
emergency.faq4Q: What should I do until the technician arrives?
emergency.faq4A: It is preferable to turn off the AC completely and disconnect it from power to avoid compressor damage.

maintenance.heroSubtitle: Total peace of mind all year round with customized proactive maintenance plans.
maintenance.overviewText: Periodic maintenance prevents 90% of sudden breakdowns. Our contracts provide you with regular visits that ensure your devices work at maximum efficiency and minimum consumption.
maintenance.benefit4: Periodic status reports for each device
maintenance.feature1Desc: We provide packages suitable for homes, villas, and commercial complexes.
maintenance.feature2Desc: We remind you of the maintenance appointment before its time to arrange the visit.
maintenance.feature3Desc: Annual contracts save a lot compared to requesting each service separately.
maintenance.faq1Q: What does a periodic maintenance visit include?
maintenance.faq1A: It includes filter cleaning, gas pressure inspection, drainage channel cleaning, and electrical connection inspection.
maintenance.faq2Q: Does the contract include spare parts?
maintenance.faq2A: We have different packages; some include consumable parts, and others provide discounts on them.
maintenance.faq3A: Yes, our policies are flexible and allow for adjustment or cancellation according to the agreed terms.
maintenance.faq4Q: Do you serve companies and buildings?
maintenance.faq4A: Yes, specialists in maintenance contracts for offices, mosques, and large residential complexes.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.description: We are here to help. You can reach us via any of the following methods or fill out the form and we will get back to you shortly.
Contact.name: Full Name
Contact.message: Details of the problem or request
